title: Plastic Hearts
notes:
Housed in a gatefold jacket. 
Each record comes inside a black-paper inner sleeve.
Includes a 12-page vinyl sized booklet, with pictures and credits for each song. 

[r=19570501] - Bigger "Parental Advisory - Explicit Content", label on front (bottom left)
[r=19599688] - Smaller "Parental Advisory - Explicit Content", label on front (bottom left) (this release)

© 2021 & © 2020 RCA Records, a division of Sony Music Entertainment. Distributed by Sony Music Entertainment. 
Sony Music Entertainment International Services GmbH, PO Box 510, 33311 Gütersloh, Germany.
Made in the EU. LC00316 / 19439-83735-1
